## Type of change

- [ ] New source added
- [ ] Existing entry updated (URL, status, metadata)

## Checklist

- [ ] Entry follows the [standard template](../CONTRIBUTING.md#entry-template)
- [ ] Link tested and working (or status set to `legacy`/`watchlist`)
- [ ] Placed in the correct category file per [taxonomy](../docs/taxonomy.md)
- [ ] No duplicate of an existing entry
- [ ] Licence field sourced from the provider (not assumed)
- [ ] Markdown formatting matches [style guide](../STYLEGUIDE.md)
